parameters.query: SELECT type, SUM(montant_ht) as total FROM revenue_events WHERE mois = '{{ $json.mois }}' AND montant_ht > 0 GROUP BY type;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ht), 0) as mrr FROM revenue_events WHERE mois = '{{ $json.mois }}' AND type = 'abonnement' AND montant_ht > 0;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_commission), 0) as commissions_dues FROM commissions WHERE mois = '{{ $json.mois }}' AND statut IN ('en_attente', 'validee');
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_commission), 0) as commissions_payees FROM commissions WHERE mois = '{{ $json.mois }}' AND statut = 'payee';
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ht), 0) as prev_total FROM revenue_events WHERE mois = '{{ $json.prev_mois }}' AND montant_ht > 0;
